title: Domain Errors, State, and Resource Lifecycles · Behavior Case: Oop State Machines
summary: Keep loan state transitions, storage sessions, and notification failures recoverable and observable. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop state machines increment in a stateful failure-resilient service. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model allowed states and transitions explicitly so every method preserves domain invariants.
Inspect annotations with supported APIs while accounting for lazy evaluation, forward references, and arbitrary-code risk.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
